Brahmims are [[Hindu]] priests. They form a hereditary caste which causes issues<ref>https://youtu.be/Fdx52S6Zc_8</ref>

Brahmins are believed to have originated in the twofold [[Proto Indo European Religion|Proto Indo European]] [[Lambda Priesthood]] of [[Flamen]]-[[Gandarva]] having emerged from the Flamens of [[Overseer]] over the Gandarvas of [[Underseer]].

{{Priestly Lineages}}
==References==

[[Category:Priesthood]]
[[sn:Brahmins]][[Category:Indo-European culture]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
